name: Lilly Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and flour until well combined.
2. Mix in the cream cheese until smooth.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Cut into desired shapes using a glass cutter.
5. Fill each shape with your favorite jelly (apricot, grape, strawberry, etc.).
6. Fold the sides over and pinch together to form a cone shape.
7. Bake for 15 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Turn off the heat and remove from oven when done.
